title: Zagazig, Sharqia — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Zagazig, Sharqia: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Zagazig is a city in Sharqia with a population of 302,000. A Nile Delta city and agricultural center, known for its university and the nearby Bubastis archaeological site.

Last updated: July 13, 2026
